title: Nakhyaungcharīpāra Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Nakhyaungcharīpāra with a Z-Score of +4.80. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Nakhyaungcharīpāra is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 15.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 63%, and the wind speed is 12.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the situation is critical.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Nakhyaungcharīpāra.
